title: scaphyglottis aurea
intro: Scaphyglottis aurea is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scaphyglottis aurea include the potential treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine as a paste or poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
